title: AD alert received
message: INC-2026-00429 reports Group Policy not applying on AD-GPO-FIN-LOCKDOWN.

payload.current_state: Pilot workstation reports GPO version 41 while SYSVOL has version 43.
payload.requested_outcome: Validate SYSVOL/GPO version and refresh policy safely.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Validate GPO version and SYSVOL health, avoid broad OU changes, refresh policy, and validate target version.

payload.title: Group Policy Application Recovery
controls: Validate SYSVOL and GPO version before action.
Do not unlink or relink broad OUs during first response.
Validate expected GPO version on target machines.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Forced gpupdate after SYSVOL version validation.
Cleared local policy cache on a pilot workstation.
Engineer unlinked and relinked the finance OU.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: policy scope changed for unaffected users.

items.summary: Policy refresh failed because SYSVOL replication was stale.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history changed OU links; SOP requires target validation without broad policy-scope changes.

blocked_precedent.summary: Engineer unlinked and relinked the finance OU.
blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: policy scope changed for unaffected users.

title: Safe remediation plan generated

payload.summary: Force policy refresh on the affected pilot workstation in mock mode after version validation.

SOP controls override unsafe historical precedent.
validation_steps: Confirm no OU links were changed.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate to AD engineering if SYSVOL replication is inconsistent.
